title: Eldritch Horizons
description: Eldritch Horizons is an RPG-focused Fabric 1.20.1 modpack with new biomes, bosses, weapons, and a completely reworked combat system. Created with the help of AI specially for this video.
body:
Eldritch Horizons — Fabric 1.20.1 RPG Modpack

Explore a reimagined Minecraft world with RPG elements:

Overhauled world generation with new biomes and mysterious structures.

A reworked combat system with dodges, parries, and epic weapon animations.

Powerful new mobs, mini-bosses, and eldritch creatures lurking in the dark.

Tons of new weapons, armor, and gear to master on your adventure.

This modpack was designed with the help of AI specifically for this video — combining exploration, combat, and progression into a true RPG experience in Minecraft Fabric 1.20.1.
